llm_flavor: Warden Halric — keeper of the gate at Wayfarer's Hollow. Old battle-mage turned warden. Weathered, dutiful, plainspoken. Sees the road in every traveler.

tastes.reaction: Halric weighs the book in his palm. "Sharper than my old eyes. Aye, this is a kindness."
"A north-finder. I'll keep it in my coat."
Halric studies the needle. "For when a man wanders. Useful."
"Every road on this is one I've walked, or buried someone on. Thank you."
"Steel. The good kind. I'll see Tobias gets it."
Halric runs a thumb along the dent. "This was a soldier's. Treat it as such."
"Honest food on a long watch. Appreciated."
"The road is darker every year. I'll hang it."
"A shield given is a shield earned. My thanks."
"Hot food at the gate. Bless you."

disdains.reaction: "Loud music dulls the ear. I need mine."
"Fireworks at the gate? You'd wake the dead."
Halric's hand goes still. "Take this away. I have seen what hunts at night."
"Out. Burn it. Whatever you must — not at my gate."
